title: Photoshop Expert - For new corporate website - MUST READ BEFORE BID
brief: We are looking for a highly skilled photo retoucher and image editor to professionally enhance a complete set of images for our corporate website. Project Scope All website images must be professionally edited, optimized, and prepared for a premium corporate online presence. The goal is to create a clean, high-quality, and visually impressive look that reflects the professionalism of our brand. Required Editing Work Professional-grade photo retouching Correct lighting imbalances and exposure issues Enhance color, contrast, and sharpness Remove distractions, unwanted objects, and background clutter Improve composition where required Ensure images maintain a natural and realistic appearance Create a consistent visual style across all website images Resize and optimize images for web performance without compromising quality Prepare images for desktop, tablet, and mobile responsiveness Enhance key images to create a strong visual impact on the website Desired Outcome The final images should: Look premium, modern, and professional Be suitable for a high-end corporate website Showcase our facilities, operations, equipment, and people in the best possible light Stand out visually while maintaining authenticity Be optimized for fast website loading and excellent user experience Ideal Freelancer Proven experience in high-end corporate photo retouching Strong portfolio demonstrating before-and-after image enhancements Experience preparing images for modern websites Excellent attention
